title: Add a container build target to a project
description: Adds a `@nx/docker:build` target to a project, with a starter Dockerfile if none exists.

project.description: The name of the project to add the container build target to.
project.x-prompt: What project would you like to add the container build target to?

targetName.description: Name of the target to add.

x-prompt.message: Which container engine would you like to use?

template.description: Starter Dockerfile template to scaffold, if one doesn't already exist.

x-prompt.message: Which Dockerfile template would you like to start from?

skipFormat.description: Skip formatting the workspace after the generator completes.
